name: Kangjin Kim, DPH
title: Assistant Professor
department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
bio: Kangjin Kim’s research focuses on statistical and computational methods for high-dimensional biomedical data, with applications to statistical genetics, multi-omics, survival and prediction modeling, respiratory disease, and precision medicine.

background.label: Education
background.value: BS in Statistics; MPH/DPH in Biostatistics

background.label: Postdoctoral Research
background.value: Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women’s Hospital
